vector_strike.name: Vector Strike
vector_strike.description: A precise, high‑velocity strike that follows a clean combat vector.

pulse_rend.name: Pulse Rend
pulse_rend.description: Tear through the target with a rapid sequence of digital impacts.

overload_crash.name: Overload Crash
overload_crash.description: Unleash a heavy burst of force that risks destabilizing the user.

sync_flow.name: Sync Flow
sync_flow.description: Enter a synchronized combat rhythm that enhances speed and initiative.

core_align.name: Core Align
core_align.description: Align internal systems to enhance both physical and digital output.

stability_weave.name: Stability Weave
stability_weave.description: Weave stabilizing threads through your pattern to restore balance and resilience.

disrupt_pattern.name: Disrupt Pattern
disrupt_pattern.description: Distort the target’s combat pattern, weakening their next move.

anchor_lock.name: Anchor Lock
anchor_lock.description: Lock the target’s movement vector, slowing them and reducing evasion.

phase_jam.name: Phase Jam
phase_jam.description: Jam the target’s phase timing, potentially interrupting their action.
